expectations.text: The response mentions /batch as the command for fanning out large changesets
expectations.evidence: Does not mention /batch. Recommends 'claude -p in a shell loop' as the primary approach. /batch may not be in the docs yet.

expectations.text: The response explains that /batch uses worktree agents to parallelize the work
